letter_text:
Superior Court of California, County of Alameda
JURY SUMMONS
Juror ID: 44551122
Name: DMITRI VOLKOV

You are summoned for jury service. You must complete the online questionnaire and confirm your availability.

Report date: You are on call for the week of February 9, 2026. Call the jury line or check online after 5:00 PM the business day before your report date to learn if you must appear.

Complete the eligibility questionnaire within 5 days of receiving this summons. Failure to respond to a jury summons may result in penalties. If you need to postpone, request a one-time postponement online.
